content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月20日 周三
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [Doorman11991/smallcode](https://github.com/Doorman11991/smallcode)
   AI coding agent optimized for small LLMs. 87% benchmark with 4B-active model. | ⭐715
2. [AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App](https://github.com/AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App)
   Claude pro free Mythos design Opus Cowork  Sonnet AI Anthropic App: download fre | ⭐469
3. [evilsocket/audit](https://github.com/evilsocket/audit)
   An 8-stage vulnerability-discovery agent. | ⭐289
4. [LiuMengxuan04/shushu-internship-tool](https://github.com/LiuMengxuan04/shushu-internship-tool)
   把岗位描述变项目，把项目变简历，把简历变面试。 | ⭐239
5. [nhutdang198/AI-Final-fantasy-6-remake](https://github.com/nhutdang198/AI-Final-fantasy-6-remake)
   ai final fantasy 6 remake: Release download free github fan made game pcwatch vi | ⭐237
6. [SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser](https://github.com/SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser)
   CloakBrowser Github: anti-detect browser download, source-level chromium patches | ⭐215
7. [agent-quality-controls/slopless](https://github.com/agent-quality-controls/slopless)
   Deterministic textlint rules and CLI for catching prose slop in Markdown | ⭐198
8. [lynote-ai/humanize-text](https://github.com/lynote-ai/humanize-text)
   Open-source Al text humanizationtoolkit. 4 proven methods totransform Al-generat | ⭐172

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
